title: AST Warrant Arrest: North Pole [AK25043608]
summary: On 05/08/2025 at 2147 hours a Trooper recognized Arline Hanson at the Holmes Road transfer site. The Trooper arrested her on her active warrant and remanded her at FCC without incident.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Get Started with Passport and NPR+!
summary: If you’ve donated to KUAC, you’ll receive an email about setting up Passport and NPR+. Everyone who donates $60 or more to KUAC receives Passport, and everyone who donates $120 or more receives both Passport and NPR+ — even if they chose another Thank You gift! Read on to learn how to get the most f...

title: AST Sport Fishing Violation: Nikishka Beach [AK25043831]
summary: On 5/8/25 at approximately 0900 hours, Alaska Wildlife Troopers contacted, Myron Moses, 51 YOA of Anchorage, while surf fishing from Nikishka Beach. Moses did not have a 2025 sport fishing license and issued a citation with a $220 fine.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Death Investigation: Fairbanks [AK25043811]
summary: On 5/8/25 at approximately 0750 hours, the Fairbanks Alaska State Troopers received a report of a deceased male at his home in the Fairbanks area. sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

summary: On May 3, 2025, at 9:25pm, the Alaska State Troopers received a report that 29-year-old Jobe Hadley, of Buckland, was found deceased at his residence. title: AST Improper Use of Plates: Fairbanks [AK25043789]
summary: On May 08, 2025, at approximately 0632 hours, Alaskan State Troopers initiated a traffic stop on the vehicle turning from Easy St. to E. Van Horn Rd in Fairbanks. A records check revealed the driver, Angus Peters (56M), had an expired driver's license. The vehicle was found to have a fake "Z" tab affixed to the license plate which was also expired. Angus was issued a summons to appear for misuse of plates and released from the scene.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: the vehicle turning from Easy St
